slides.title: Why agents lose leads before follow-up
slides.body: Most leads go cold when the first reply is delayed, generic, or lost in the system.
slides.visualNotes: Hook slide with branded headline and simple layout.

slides.title: Slow follow-up kills interest
slides.body: Leads expect a response fast. Delayed replies let competitors step in.
slides.visualNotes: Show a clock or timing visual.

slides.title: Generic replies feel robotic
slides.body: Personalization is the difference between a lead and a lost contact.
slides.visualNotes: Compare generic vs tailored messaging visually.

slides.title: Leads disappear without tracking
slides.body: When follow-ups are untagged, nobody owns the lead and it falls through cracks.
slides.visualNotes: Show a CRM pipeline or lead list gone missing.

slides.title: One channel is not enough
slides.body: Relying on a single contact method means one missed message can lose the deal.
slides.visualNotes: Use phone + email + text icon cluster.

slides.title: Fix it with four simple habits
slides.body: Fast response, tailored follow-up, lead tagging, and multi-channel reach.

slides.title: Faster follow-up wins more deals
slides.body: Agents who improve response time see better lead conversion and stronger pipeline control.

slides.title: Build trust before the first meeting
slides.body: Consistent, confident lead handling makes you the obvious choice.

caption: Agents are losing leads in plain sight. Swipe through the 8 common breakdowns and learn the quick fixes that keep more conversations alive.
